About ChatGPT

ChatGPT is a ai chatbots platform founded in 2022. It positions itself as “The world's most popular AI chatbot by OpenAI” and is best suited for general questions, coding help, writing, analysis. Pricing starts at Free, and a free plan is available.

Features

FeatureAvailable
Web SearchYes
File UploadYes
Code ExecutionYes
Image GenerationYes
Voice InputYes
PluginsYes
Api AccessYes
MemoryYes
MultilingualYes
CitationsNo

Pros & Cons

Pros

  • Most versatile AI chatbot available
  • Massive plugin and GPT store ecosystem
  • Excellent code execution and data analysis

Cons

  • Free tier uses older model
  • Can confidently state incorrect information
  • Privacy concerns with conversation data
